intentSynonyms: calculate order price without placing it in starbucks
description: Get pricing for a cart of items at a specific store. This does NOT place an order — it only calculates the total price. Provide items with their SKUs (from get_product) and the store number. Returns itemized pricing and the order total.

store_number.description: Store number to price the order at

sku.description: SKU of the product size (from get_product size data, e.g., "11186315")

child_skus.description: Optional array of customization SKUs (syrups, milk, etc. from get_product options)

items.description: Cart items with SKUs and quantities
